infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera for AR experiences.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app can record audio while capturing AR moments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app can access your photo library for AR captures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app can save AR photos and videos to your library.
